data.body: [G3 re-confirm â€” parent 72d5 vs child 92fa (B-UX visual editor)] 4-bucket audit: parent AC1â†’B2(6b06)/B1(723c); AC2â†’B3(dc58); AC3â†’B4(101a); AC4â†’f12d+0408; AC5/AC6â†’B6(7e48); parent SC = composite of those. THIS child contributes to NONE of them (editor dropdowns / inline overlay-trigger create / in-editor criterion+prompt authoring / Playwright E2E). Whole-roster cross-check: no parent criterion is left UNCOVERED. Remaining G3 finding is STRUCTURAL: B-UX (and backing B-DM 5506) is a child with no anchoring parent criterion â€” the epic's AC set does not bound this deliverable, so the epic can satisfy AC1â€“AC6 while B-UX stays open (or vice versa). Suggested fix: either add a parent AC making the editor/data-model work an explicit epic deliverable, or re-parent B-UX+B-DM out of this epic.
